## Description

Provide a clear description of the changes introduced by this PR and the problem being solved.

- **Related Issue**: Fixes #

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] `fix`: Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] `feat`: New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] `docs`: Documentation update
- [ ] `build`: Build system, ISO script, or `mods/` update
- [ ] `refactor`: Code restructuring without functional change

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested build scripts locally on a compatible Ubuntu host environment (`make bootstrap` & `make`).
- [ ] Confirmed shell script syntax is valid (`bash -n script.sh`).
- [ ] Verified GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPL-3.0) compliance.
- [ ] Preserved upstream copyright notices and attributions in `UPSTREAM.md`.
- [ ] Verified no secrets, credentials, API keys, certificates, or large binary ISO files are included in this PR.
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation in `docs/`, `CHANGELOG.md`, or `README.md`.
